title: Monitor Security Controls on an Ongoing Basis
description: monitor security controls on an ongoing basis to ensure the continued effectiveness of the controls

checks.name: Security Controls are Monitored on an Ongoing Basis
checks.purpose: Ongoing monitoring of security controls through continuous monitoring programs, automated scanning, and manual review is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Security Controls are Monitored on an Ongoing Basis
checks.purpose: Ongoing monitoring of security controls is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Security Controls are Monitored on an Ongoing Basis
checks.purpose: Ongoing monitoring of security controls is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Security Controls are Monitored on an Ongoing Basis
checks.purpose: Ongoing monitoring of security controls is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and implement a continuous monitoring program that includes automated vulnerability scanning, configuration monitoring, log review, and security metric tracking. Document monitoring activities, findings, and responses. Ensure monitoring results feed into the POA&M and security assessment processes.
